onboarding.tagline:
Ọ bụ ikike nnyefe kacha ọsọ
n'ime Nigeria.
onboarding.sheetTitle:
Ọsọ. Ntụkwasị obi.
Nnyefe ọgụgụ isi.
onboarding.sheetSub: Jikọọ onwe gị na ndị ọrụ nnyefe enyocha, soro ọdọ ihe n'oge dị mfe, ma nweta ọnụahịa kachasị mma na-akpaghị aka.
onboarding.featureSameDay: Nnyefe otu ụbọchị na Lagos, Abuja & PH
onboarding.featureGps: Iso GPS dị ndụ n'ọdọ ihe ọ bụla
onboarding.featureVerified: Ndị ọrụ nnyefe enyochara. Nnyefe nwere ihe nchedo.

auth.passwordPlaceholder: Mkpụrụedemede 8+ nwere isi obere, isi oche, nọmba/akara
auth.ageConfirm: A na-ekwenye m na m nwere ọjị 18 ma ọ bụ karịa
auth.termsConfirm: Anọkwara m na Usoro Ọrụ, Iwu Omume Onye Ọrụ, na Iwu Nzuzo
auth.fillAllFields: Biko jupụta n'oghere ndị a chọrọ ụlọ ma họrọ ụdị ugbo ala.
auth.invalidPhone: Tinye nọmba ekwentị Nigeria dị mma (dịka 08012345678).
auth.weakPassword: Okwuntughe kwesịrị ịbụ mkpụrụedemede 8+ nwere isi obere, isi oche, nọmba ma ọ bụ akara.
auth.ageRequired: Ị kwesịrị ịkwenye na ị nwere ọjị 18 ma ọ bụ karịa.
auth.termsRequired: Ị kwesịrị ịnọkwara Usoro Ọrụ na Iwu Nzuzo.
auth.loginFailed: Ịbanye dara ada. Biko nwalee ọzọ.
auth.registrationFailed: Ịdebanye aha dara ada. Biko nwalee ọzọ.

home.goOnlineToEarn: Banye n'ịntanetị iji bido ịnweta ego
home.goOnlineToReceive: Banye n'ịntanetị iji bido ịnata arịrịọ ọrụ.
home.noJobsNearby: Ọrụ adịghị nso. Nọrọ n'ịntanetị — arịrịọ ọhụrụ na-abịa mgbe mgbe.

earnings.title: Uru
earnings.goalReached: Ruru ebumnobi! Gaa n'ihu iji nweta ọbara ọbara.

history.title: Njem M
history.completeToSee: Mechee nnyefe iji hụ ha ebe a.

kyc.title: Nkwenye Njirimara
kyc.allSubmitted: Akwụkwọ niile nyefere — nyochaa n'ime awa 24
kyc.nationalIdFrontDesc: ID gọọmentị nyere ma ọ bụ akwụkwọ NIN slip (akụkụ ihu)
kyc.nationalIdBackDesc: Akụkụ azụ nke Njirimara Mba ma ọ bụ akwụkwọ NIN slip
kyc.selfieDesc: Foto ọcha nke ihu gị — eji ya na profaịlụ onye ọrụ gị
kyc.vehiclePhotoDesc: Foto zuru ezu nke ugbo ala gị na-egosi nọmba ya
kyc.ownershipProofDesc: Ndebanye aha ugbo ala ma ọ bụ akwụkwọ nwe
kyc.guarantorDesc: Akwụkwọ si n'aka onye nkwado (a tụrụ aro, ọ dịghị mkpa)
kyc.viewPartners: Hụ ndị na-enye ọrụ nchedo anyị
kyc.chooseSource: Họrọ ka ị ga-esi were akwụkwọ ahụ
kyc.libraryPermission: Ikike ịbanye ụlọ akwụkwọ foto achọrọ.
kyc.referralNote: Seirs na-anata ụgwọ ntụziaka mgbe ị na-azụ site n'aka onye mmekọ. Nke a adịghị emetụta ụgwọ gị.

profile.title: Profaịlụ
profile.supportAlert: Kpọọ anyị na 0700-SEIRS-01 ma ọ bụ zipụta email na drivers@seirs.app

ratings.title: Ọkwa M
ratings.belowThresholdBody: Nkezi gị ({{average}}) dị n'okpuru {{threshold}}. Ọkwa ọ dị ala nke gara n'ihu nwere ike ibute nyocha akaụntụ. Hụ ndụmọdụ n'okpuru iji melite.
ratings.tip1: Ruo n'oge — ọ bụ oge nke na-abawanye ọkwa gị karịa ihe ọ bụla
ratings.tip2: Jide ngwongwo nwayọọ nwayọọ ma jide ya n'aka abụọ
ratings.tip3: Bụrụ onye nwere omume mma, ọkachamara, ma kịkọọ ndị ahịa n'ịnụụ obi ụtọ
ratings.tip4: Jide ugbo ala gị ọcha n'ime na n'èzí
ratings.tip5: Kwenye nnyefe site n'iji foto ihe akaebe nnyefe dị ọcha

withdrawal.title: Wepu Uru
withdrawal.withdrawalsNote: Ịwepụ ego na-abịa n'ime nkeji 30 site na nnyefe NIP.

active.title: Nnyefe Dị Ndụ
active.proofHint: Were foto mgbe ị na-enye onye ọrụ ngwongwo ahụ. A chọrọ ya iji kwenye nnyefe.
active.takePhotoFirst: Were foto ihe akaebe na mbụ
active.proofRequiredMsg: Biko were foto tupu ị kwenye nnyefe.
active.deliveryCompleteMsg:
Ị nyefere {{trackingCode}} nke ọma.

A ga-etinye ụgwọ na akpa ego gị n'oge na-adịghị anya.
active.cameraPermission: Ikike ịbanye igwefoto achọrọ iji were foto ihe akaebe nnyefe.

language.title: Asụsụ & Mpaghara
language.currencyNote: A na-arụ ọrụ azụmahịa niile na Naira Nigeria (NGN). Ego ndị ọzọ bụ naanị maka ngosi.

common.error: Ihe mere nke ọjọọ. Biko nwalee ọzọ.
